title: senecio occidentalis
intro: Senecio occidentalis, also known as Western Ragwort, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Western Ragwort include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Western Ragwort can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it is essential to note that it should only be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential toxicity.
